CheckTitle: Okta password policies check passwords against common-password dictionaries
Description: Every active Okta Password Policy should enforce common-password dictionary checks.
Risk: Weak or inconsistent password policy settings increase credential guessing, reuse, and account takeover risk for users governed by less strict policies.

Code.Other: Security > Authentication > Password: edit each active password policy and adjust password settings to the STIG requirement.

Recommendation.Text: Update every active Okta Password Policy to enforce common-password dictionary checks.
